description_long: This is a pair of low-top, lace-up sneakers in a rich burgundy color with black laces and white rubber soles. The shoes feature a canvas upper with visible stitching and a small branded tag on the side. The toe box is rounded, and the overall silhouette is classic and casual, suitable for everyday urban wear. The soles show some scuffing and dirt, indicating light use, but the structure remains intact. The interior appears padded for comfort, and the heel area is reinforced for durability. Branding details are visible on the tongue and heel tab, adding to the recognizable style.
description: A pair of burgundy canvas low-top sneakers with black laces and white rubber soles, showing light signs of use and clear branding details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe boxes, black laces, and tongue branding.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the small branded tag, stitching, and profile of the shoe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the reinforced heel area and heel tab branding.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible stitching and side profile.
attribute_logo: White 'Vans' logo on the tongue and a small black-and-white tag on the side; white logo patch on the heel tab.
